TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ernest Bai Koroma ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 10, Ernest Bai Koroma, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1953) mrhuw Sierra leone ta' misuw hya' ga Ernest Bai Koroma, aring ryax tay 17 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2007 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ernes~…ēt ő≤ai koroma rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj **, ernes~…ēt ő≤ai koroma, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw s~…ēierra leone ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ernes~…ēt ő≤ai koroma, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Ernest Bai Koroma ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 10, Ernest Bai Koroma, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1953) mrhuw Sierra leone ta' misuw hya' ga Ernest Bai Koroma, aring ryax tay 17 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2007 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
